sentences.arabic: فِي آخِرِ يَوْمٍ جَمَعَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ ذِكْرَيَاتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Posljednjeg dana porodica je skupila svoja sjećanja.
sentences.translationEn: On the last day the family gathered their memories.

sentences.arabic: تَحَدَّثَ كُلُّ وَاحِدٍ عَنْ أَجْمَلِ لَحْظَةٍ فِي الرِّحْلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svako je govorio o najljepšem trenutku putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Each one spoke about the most beautiful moment of the trip.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الطِّفْلُ: أَحَبُّ مَا رَأَيْتُهُ هُوَ الْبَحْرُ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je reklo: Ono što sam najviše volio je more.
sentences.translationEn: The child said: The thing I loved most was the sea.

sentences.arabic: وَعَدَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ أَنْ تَعُودَ الصَّيْفَ الْقَادِمَ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je obećala da će se vratiti idućeg ljeta.
sentences.translationEn: The family promised to return next summer.
